brand_voice_note: Confident gallery-meets-showroom voice that pairs premium decor language with genuine deal-driven urgency and helpful, reassuring guidance for online shoppers.

concepts.primary_text:
One left. This price won't come back.

The Sara Illuminated Mirror is our floor stock star: Bluetooth to stream your music, built-in demister, and adjustable light from warm white to daylight. Now $795 (90 x 60 cm).

Overstocked and underpriced means someone gets a showroom-quality mirror for less. Call 03 9576 1566 to make sure it's still yours.
concepts.headline: The Last Sara At $795
concepts.why_it_works: Scarcity plus a clear call-to-check kills the 'is this real or already gone' hesitation on a genuine one-of-one clearance piece.

concepts.product_title: CLEARANCE STOCK Rectangle Illuminated Mirror  90 x 70 cm
concepts.primary_text:
Fog-free, glowing, ready in seconds.

This ultra-modern rectangle illuminated mirror lights up from the front and wipes out steam with a built-in demister. Ideal for powder rooms and bathrooms, 90 x 70 cm.

Just one at this floor stock price of $395. Free Melbourne pickup or local delivery.
concepts.headline: A Clear Mirror, Every Morning
concepts.why_it_works: Leads with the single most desirable everyday outcome, a clear glowing mirror, which is exactly what a bathroom shopper pictures wanting.

concepts.primary_text:
Bad bathroom lighting ruins good makeup.

The Curved Illuminated Mirror fixes it with LED that glows through the front glass and washes soft light back onto the wall, so your finishing touches actually look right. Curved corners, built-in demister, $675.

Sleek, sophisticated, and made for the space you get ready in every day.
concepts.headline: Lighting That Gets It Right
concepts.why_it_works: Names the real friction of poor bathroom lighting and positions the dual front-and-back illumination as the direct fix, which suits a design-conscious buyer.
